title: Skill
description: A skill lineage or one of its immutable revisions (spec §28.15-28.16, TOL-011). A skill is UNTRUSTED content: its metadata rides the run context, its body is read on-demand via the workspace file tool, and it grants NO capability. object is 'skill' for the lineage projection and 'skill_revision' for a revision, which carries the sanitized-archive digest, the quarantine scan findings, and the lifecycle state.

digest.description: sha256 over the quarantine-sanitized archive; the run pin records THIS, never 'latest'.

scan_findings.description: Static-scan hits (secret / executable) that keep a revision quarantined until resolved; carries the rule and path, never a captured value.
